verdict: Popular hydrating lotion leveraging hyaluronic acid's humectant properties with a lightweight gel texture. Strong value proposition with solid consumer validation.

_research.name: Neutrogena Hydro Boost Hydrating Lotion
pros: Hyaluronic acid draws moisture into skin effectively
Fast-absorbing gel texture suitable for combination skin
Excellent review volume (4800 reviews) at budget price
_research.con: Lacks ceramides and cholesterol needed for true barrier repair in very dry skin.
